records.m_Talk_ENG: The city disappeared and we're in a ship corridor now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The city disappeared and we're in a ship corridor now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The city disappeared and we're in a ship corridor now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Varunastra is the name Miss Aditya gave to the division's ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Varunastra is the name Miss Aditya gave to the division's ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Varunastra is the name Miss Aditya gave to the division's ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is what the C.O. used to look like.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is what the C.O. used to look like.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is what the C.O. used to look like.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the corridor from when Varunastra used to be a ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the corridor from when Varunastra used to be a ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the corridor from when Varunastra used to be a ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the coordinates stabilize, I think its original appearance is being revealed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the coordinates stabilize, I think its original appearance is being revealed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the coordinates stabilize, I think its original appearance is being revealed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Even after taking that into account, it's too quiet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Even after taking that into account, it's too quiet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Even after taking that into account, it's too quiet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, what's it like out here? Is it peaceful? Is Miss Aditya still as kind as ever?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, what's it like out here? Is it peaceful? Is Miss Aditya still as kind as ever?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, what's it like out here? Is it peaceful? Is Miss Aditya still as kind as ever?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's still crawling with C.O.s out there, and life is hard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's still crawling with C.O.s out there, and life is hard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's still crawling with C.O.s out there, and life is hard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Miss Aditya was put into cryogenic sleep in a capsule for some reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Miss Aditya was put into cryogenic sleep in a capsule for some reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Miss Aditya was put into cryogenic sleep in a capsule for some reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. I expected that, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. I expected that, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. I expected that, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still... I'm glad that I met my father's companions and saw some of his memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still... I'm glad that I met my father's companions and saw some of his memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still... I'm glad that I met my father's companions and saw some of his memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, hahaha. Though I'm not really sure if I should be glad about it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, hahaha. Though I'm not really sure if I should be glad about it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, hahaha. Though I'm not really sure if I should be glad about it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also... I realized that I was never alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also... I realized that I was never alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also... I realized that I was never alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knowing that his compass was with me this whole time... kind of made me happy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knowing that his compass was with me this whole time... kind of made me happy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knowing that his compass was with me this whole time... kind of made me happy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem! How did you meet Miss Aditya, anyway?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem! How did you meet Miss Aditya, anyway?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem! How did you meet Miss Aditya, anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When Counters weren't revealed to the public, my parents abandoned me out of fear after my awakening.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When Counters weren't revealed to the public, my parents abandoned me out of fear after my awakening.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When Counters weren't revealed to the public, my parents abandoned me out of fear after my awakening.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, while I was wandering around one day, my ability went out of control and caused a huge storm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, while I was wandering around one day, my ability went out of control and caused a huge storm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, while I was wandering around one day, my ability went out of control and caused a huge storm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aditya is the one who pulled me out of the storm, gave me my name, and taught me many things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aditya is the one who pulled me out of the storm, gave me my name, and taught me many things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aditya is the one who pulled me out of the storm, gave me my name, and taught me many things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She even taught me how to control my power and how to survive in this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She even taught me how to control my power and how to survive in this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She even taught me how to control my power and how to survive in this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She also trained me very hard, but I think all of it helped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She also trained me very hard, but I think all of it helped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She also trained me very hard, but I think all of it helped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds like you've been through a lot. And how could your parents just abandon you for becoming a Counter...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds like you've been through a lot. And how could your parents just abandon you for becoming a Counter...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds like you've been through a lot. And how could your parents just abandon you for becoming a Counter...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Counters weren't as common back then, so they might have mistaken me for a monster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Counters weren't as common back then, so they might have mistaken me for a monster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Counters weren't as common back then, so they might have mistaken me for a monster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What was my father like over there? Was he a good person to everyone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What was my father like over there? Was he a good person to everyone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What was my father like over there? Was he a good person to everyone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first flame of the sun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first flame of the sun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first flame of the sun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what all the division members called him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what all the division members called him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what all the division members called him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we make it out of here, I'll share stories of him with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we make it out of here, I'll share stories of him with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we make it out of here, I'll share stories of him with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From what I heard, Miss Aditya was the one who gave him the name Ravi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From what I heard, Miss Aditya was the one who gave him the name Ravi.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From what I heard, Miss Aditya was the one who gave him the name Ravi.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Aditya was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Aditya was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Aditya was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, you have a compass, right? Could you take it out for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, you have a compass, right? Could you take it out for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, you have a compass, right? Could you take it out for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The compass can't seem to point to a direction after I got here. Do you think it's broken?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The compass can't seem to point to a direction after I got here. Do you think it's broken?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The compass can't seem to point to a direction after I got here. Do you think it's broken?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... I think it's likely because this place is cut off from the outside world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... I think it's likely because this place is cut off from the outside world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... I think it's likely because this place is cut off from the outside world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This compass is designed to point to other compasses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This compass is designed to point to other compasses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This compass is designed to point to other compasses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was used to prevent being isolated by having all the division members possess one.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was used to prevent being isolated by having all the division members possess one.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was used to prevent being isolated by having all the division members possess one.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: It also served as a reminder that you were never alone even if you were trapped in darkness...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It also served as a reminder that you were never alone even if you were trapped in darkness...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It also served as a reminder that you were never alone even if you were trapped in darkness...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, I lost mine long ago, and could never find it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, I lost mine long ago, and could never find it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, I lost mine long ago, and could never find it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think he left you this compass to let you know that you were never alone, Asha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think he left you this compass to let you know that you were never alone, Asha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think he left you this compass to let you know that you were never alone, Asha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess he wanted you to find wherever Aditya was and move onward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess he wanted you to find wherever Aditya was and move onward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess he wanted you to find wherever Aditya was and move onward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't... alone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't... alone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't... alone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. So, shall we go out and go look for Miss Aditya?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. So, shall we go out and go look for Miss Aditya?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. So, shall we go out and go look for Miss Aditya?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I promised myself that I wouldn't let her be alone this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I promised myself that I wouldn't let her be alone this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I promised myself that I wouldn't let her be alone this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can save Miss Aditya...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can save Miss Aditya...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can save Miss Aditya...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm ready to do anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm ready to do anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm ready to do anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure we'll find Miss Aditya.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure we'll find Miss Aditya.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure we'll find Miss Aditya.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll also help, so let's not give up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll also help, so let's not give up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll also help, so let's not give up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Like father like daughter, I see you also try to cheer people up when they're down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Like father like daughter, I see you also try to cheer people up when they're down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Like father like daughter, I see you also try to cheer people up when they're down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our goal is simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our goal is simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our goal is simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First is escaping Varunastra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First is escaping Varunastra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First is escaping Varunastra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Next is anchoring Varunastra, which can swim freely between the Normalside and the imaginary space, to the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Next is anchoring Varunastra, which can swim freely between the Normalside and the imaginary space, to the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Next is anchoring Varunastra, which can swim freely between the Normalside and the imaginary space, to the Normalside.
